name: gcp
note: GCP sitemap emits URLs as cloud.google.com/<topic>/docs/... (e.g. /compute/docs, /storage/docs), not cloud.google.com/docs/. The previous allow_prefixes ["https://cloud.google.com/docs/"] matched 0 URLs. Broadened to a curated allowlist of 15 top GCP product doc topics, matching the narrow-allowlist posture used by other vendors. Markdown-endpoint caveat from 2026-05-16 still applies: cloud.google.com may 301 to docs.cloud.google.com and the transform append-md-and-accept may not yield .md for every URL — to be revisited in a follow-up crawl PR.
